message:
fix(codegen): Register 13 additional internal CPython modules

Add registrations for commonly used internal accelerator modules:
- _ast: AST node operations
- _asyncio: Async I/O primitives
- _bisect: Binary search operations
- _collections: Collection type accelerators
- _contextvars: Context variable support
- _csv: CSV parsing accelerator
- _datetime: Date/time operations
- _decimal: Decimal arithmetic
- _elementtree: XML ElementTree accelerator
- _functools: Functional programming tools
- _hashlib: Hash algorithm accelerators
- _heapq: Heap queue operations
- _json: JSON encoding/decoding accelerator
- _random: Random number generation
- _struct: Binary data packing
- _weakref: Weak reference support

These internal modules provide C-accelerated versions of pure Python
implementations and are frequently imported by CPython tests.

Test:
- import _json; import _csv; import _collections; -> all work
- import _datetime; import _functools; import _heapq; -> all work
